title: Parmenter, Damian - Director General, AUKUS, Ministry of Defence - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Parmenter left his role at the Ministry of Defence in July 2025  Senior Counsellor, Palantir Technologies UK  Mr Parmenter sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Palantir Technologies UK. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the appointment was taken up in July 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
